description: Set up environment: download Go modules for root and lambda/processor, verify existing tests pass
steps: Run 'go mod download' in the project root
Run 'cd lambda/processor && go mod download' for the Lambda module
Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" go test -v -count=1 ./...' to verify root tests pass
Run 'cd lambda/processor && go test -v -count=1 ./...' to verify Lambda tests pass
acceptance_criteria: All root Go tests pass (cdk-base_test.go, pipeline_test.go)
findings: Pre-existing failure: TestStackSnapshotStability fails on main due to stale testdata/snapshot.json (CDK version drift). All other 56 root tests pass. All Lambda processor tests pass (21 tests). Go module proxy (storage.googleapis.com) blocked in COMMON_DEPENDENCIES mode - use GOPROXY=direct to download from GitHub directly.
